desc: Moodboard and three logo directions for Harbor Candle Co. Earth tones, generous ampersands, set type in Canela and Founders Grotesk.
name: Logo directions - round 1

desc: Refine the chosen mark, lock spacing and the secondary lockup. Deliver black, white, and single-color versions.
name: Finalize primary wordmark

desc: Hand-letter the holiday candle names for the limited run. Brush pen draft scanned, then vectorized.
name: Holiday label lettering

desc: Lay out the four core candle labels in the new system. Priya to confirm scent copy before print.
name: Core label layouts

desc: Build the one-page brand guide PDF. Color, type, logo usage, and the lettering set.
name: Mini brand guide

desc: Source a kraft stock and foil option for the gift box sleeve. Get printer quote.
name: Gift box sleeve spec

desc: Spring scent line - new label artwork once Priya finalizes the names. Holding for client sign-off.
name: New scent line labels

desc: Cover wordmark for the Hannah Kim lookbook. Tall, airy capitals with a long terminal on the K.
name: Lookbook cover wordmark

desc: Section dividers for the four seasonal edits. Reuse the cover lettering at smaller weights.
name: Seasonal section dividers

desc: Grid the editorial spreads. Pair Jasmine's photos with quiet captions and lots of white space.
name: Editorial spread grid

desc: Three Instagram story templates that carry the lookbook type. Hand off as editable Canva-ready PNGs.
name: Social story templates

desc: Export print-ready lookbook PDF at 300 dpi with bleed. Hannah to approve before the run.
name: Print-ready export

desc: Pull a tight earth-tone palette from the season's pieces. Confirm against print swatches.
name: Color palette pass

desc: Spring lookbook refresh - new cover and divider set. Waiting on Hannah's shoot dates.
name: Spring lookbook refresh
